scope.levelRule: QuestInfo.lvmin < 30 or missing, with reachable Victoria NPC evidence from generated scan.
scope.purpose: Fast status lookup for agent/LLM plan selection after Maple Island.

notes: normal means the quest is considered runnable with the Maple Island-plus core capability set.
Capability-gated statuses are intentionally not treated as blocked.
manual/review statuses are excluded from autonomous scheduling until catalog evidence is filled.

statusDefinitions.normal: Runnable with core navigation, NPC interaction, quest state, combat, loot, and inventory capabilities.
statusDefinitions.requires-reactor-capability: Runnable after agents can locate, hit/activate, and collect quest reactor outputs.
statusDefinitions.requires-jump-quest-nav-graph: Runnable after jump-quest-specific route graphs and movement execution exist.
statusDefinitions.postpone-outside-current-region: Valid quest, but plan should postpone when objective leaves the current Victoria progression scope.
statusDefinitions.requires-field-boss-policy: Runnable after field boss spawn, competition, wait, and retry policy exists.
statusDefinitions.requires-pet-capability: Runnable only for agents with pet systems enabled.
statusDefinitions.requires-event-policy: Seasonal/admin/special flow; disabled unless an event policy explicitly enables it.
statusDefinitions.requires-script-review: Needs script or auto-complete behavior review.
statusDefinitions.requires-chain-source-review: Needs quest item source or chain dependency review.
statusDefinitions.requires-npc-placement-review: Needs NPC placement, reachability, or script-source review.
